overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban industrial district in Night City. The scene features bright midday sunlight, elevated highways, large spherical industrial tanks, and a prominent tower labeled '06' while pedestrians and futuristic vehicles move through the streets.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a green commercial building with purple vending machines, approaching an intersection

green street sign with white text reading MLK Blvd mounted on a pole
standard black and white regulatory speed limit sign showing 40
curved elevated highway or monorail tracks with support columns visible in the distance
tall dark industrial tower visible in the background with illuminated signage
large rectangular planter box with tall grass and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a sunlit urban sidewalk next to a green commercial building. Street signs for MLK Blvd and a 40 mph speed limit are visible on the left, while an elevated highway structure and distant industrial tower dominate the skyline ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic

events.description: black SUV drives past from right to left through the intersection
purple sports car and other futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection
pedestrian in tactical gear crosses in front of the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the intersection while observing passing traffic and waiting for vehicles to clear

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection from right to left
person in tactical gear and boots crossing the street in front of the player

entered.detail: large metallic spherical industrial storage tanks with yellow support framework
long red concrete wall with turquoise neon strip lighting along the top
white painted zebra crossing lines on the orange-tinted asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the intersection and crosses the street as vehicles including a black SUV and purple sports car drive past. Large spherical industrial tanks become visible on the right side, while a red retaining wall with neon lighting lines the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with spherical storage tanks and elevated infrastructure

events.description: passing the massive spherical industrial tanks which now dominate the right side of the view
camera tilts upward to observe the elevated highway structure with red warning lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past the industrial tanks while looking around at the architecture and elevated highways

futuristic black truck driving along the road in front of the spherical tanks

entered.detail: yellow industrial support beams and girders supporting the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The player walks past the massive spherical industrial tanks while navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic. The elevated highway with red warning lights passes directly overhead, supported by yellow steel frameworks. The tower with '06' signage becomes more prominent on the left as the player moves deeper into the industrial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial plaza approaching tower 06 with overhead highway ramps

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the tower with 06 sign against the blue sky
camera pans left to follow the curved elevated highway ramp overhead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the tower while looking up at the architecture and elevated highways, observing the industrial scenery

entered.detail: tall modern street light fixture with orange illumination panel

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the massive industrial tower marked with '06', looking up at its height against the blue sky. The elevated highway curves overhead to the left while the spherical tanks recede into the background. The scene emphasizes the scale of the industrial architecture with various pedestrians and vehicles passing through the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit urban sidewalk into the heart of a towering industrial district. It begins by moving past a green commercial building and street signs for MLK Blvd, with an elevated highway and a distant tower framing the horizon. As the camera reaches the intersection and crosses the street amidst passing SUVs and sports cars, the view shifts to reveal large spherical industrial tanks on the right and a neon-lit red retaining wall on the left. The scene then expands as the camera passes beneath the yellow steel framework of the overhead highway, moving through pedestrian traffic while the tower marked 06 looms larger on the left. Finally, the perspective tilts upward to emphasize the massive scale of the industrial tower against the blue sky as the spherical tanks recede into the background of the bustling plaza.
